allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const f of ['icon-192','icon-512','icon-maskable-512','apple-touch-icon']\){const b=fs.readFileSync\('public/icons/'+f+'.png'\);const sig=b.subarray\(0,8\).toString\('hex'\);console.log\(f, sig==='89504e470d0a1a0a'?'OK PNG':'BAD', b.length+'b'\)}")
